title: Weather and Climate Information Services (WISER): a thematic evaluation across 3 regions
body: "This independent thematic evaluation reviews the FCDO’s support for Weather and Climate Information Services (WISER) through the UK Met Office. It assesses WISER’s impacts on sustainably reducing the impacts of climate shocks and building resilience of vulnerable populations.  This evaluation improves the understanding of the relevance, impact and sustainability of UK-supported work to increase the access of weather and climate information services for the climate vulnerable.  It draws on lessons from the closed WISER regional programmes in Africa (WISER Africa1&2) and the WISER component of Asia (Asia Regional Resilience to Changing Climate ARRCC). It is informing ongoing WISER programmes being supported in the regional programmes:   Africa Region Climate and Nature, ARCAN Climate Action for Resilient Asia, CARA Pioneering a Holistic approach to Energy and Nature-based Options in Middle East and North Africa (MENA) for Long-term stability programme, PHENOMENAL   The learning evaluation assessed evidence on the relevance, coherence and sustainability of WISER interventions. It took a theory of change and case-study based approach involving review of 62 documents and 112 stakeholder interviews. It was conducted between January and November 2024. "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
